- type: string

resourceID: string
sourceImageRef:
  external: string
  name: string
  namespace: string
sourceSnapshotRef:
  external: string
  name: string
  namespace: string

- string

            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Immutable. The name of the image family to which this image belongs. You can create disks by specifying an image family instead of a specific image name. The image family always returns its latest image that is not deprecated. The name of the image family must comply with RFC1035.</p>
        </td>

            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Immutable. The type of supported feature. Read [Enabling guest operating system features](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/images/create-delete-deprecate-private-images#guest-os-features) to see a list of available options. Possible values: ["MULTI_IP_SUBNET", "SECURE_BOOT", "SEV_CAPABLE", "UEFI_COMPATIBLE", "VIRTIO_SCSI_MULTIQUEUE", "WINDOWS", "GVNIC", "SEV_LIVE_MIGRATABLE", "SEV_SNP_CAPABLE", "SUSPEND_RESUME_COMPATIBLE", "TDX_CAPABLE"].</p>

            <p>Immutable. Encrypts the image using a customer-supplied encryption key.

After you encrypt an image with a customer-supplied key, you must
provide the same key if you use the image later (e.g. to create a
disk from the image).</p>
        </td>
    </tr>

### Status
#### Schema
```yaml
archiveSizeBytes: integer
conditions:
- lastTransitionTime: string
  message: string
  reason: string
  status: string
  type: string
creationTimestamp: string
labelFingerprint: string
observedGeneration: integer
selfLink: string
```

<table class="properties responsive">
<thead>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2">Fields</th>
    </tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
    <tr>
        <td><code>archiveSizeBytes</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">integer</code></p>
            <p>Size of the image tar.gz archive stored in Google Cloud Storage (in bytes).</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">list (object)</code></p>
            <p>Conditions represent the latest available observations of the ComputeImage's current state.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[]</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">object</code></p>
            <p></p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].lastTransitionTime</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].message</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Human-readable message indicating details about last transition.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].reason</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Unique, one-word, CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].status</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Status is the status of the condition. Can be True, False, Unknown.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].type</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Type is the type of the condition.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>creationTimestamp</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Creation timestamp in RFC3339 text format.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>labelFingerprint</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The fingerprint used for optimistic locking of this resource. Used internally during updates.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedGeneration</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">integer</code></p>
            <p>ObservedGeneration is the generation of the resource that was most recently observed by the Config Connector controller. If this is equal to metadata.generation, then that means that the current reported status reflects the most recent desired state of the resource.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>selfLink</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p></p>
        </td>
    </tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Sample YAML(s)

### Image From Existing Disk
```yaml
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeImage
metadata:
  name: computeimage-sample-fromexistingdisk
spec:
  description: A sample image created from an empty disk resource
  diskRef:
    name: computeimage-dep-fromexistingdisk
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeDisk
metadata:
  name: computeimage-dep-fromexistingdisk
spec:
  location: us-central1-a
```

### Image From Url Raw
```yaml
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeImage
metadata:
  name: computeimage-sample-fromurlraw
  labels:
    image-type: stemcell
spec:
  description: A sample image created from URL to a raw TAR disk image
  family: ubuntu-custom
  licenses: ["https://compute.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/vm-options/global/licenses/enable-vmx"]
  rawDisk:
    source: "https://storage.googleapis.com/config-connector-computeimage-raw/computeimage-raw.tar.gz"
    containerType: "TAR"
    sha1: 819b7e9c17423f4539f09687eaa13687afa2fe32
```

Note: If you have any trouble with instantiating the resource, refer to <a href="https://docs.cloud.google.com/config-connector/docs/troubleshooting">Troubleshoot Config Connector</a>.
